name: s2-quality-assurance
description: Plugin for generating BDD-based test cases

s2-init.description: Initializes a QA project based on the BDDKit library

s2-setup-claude.description: Generates CLAUDE.md with skill references for the QA project

s2-create-plan.description: Creates a test implementation plan with new test definitions and review proposals for existing ones

s2-execute-plan.description: Executes the current phase of an implementation plan, generating complete test code, step definitions, and datasets

s2-review.description: Validates test structure, naming conventions, and code quality

s2-bddkit-suggestions.description: Detects common steps, objects, and elements and suggests contributions to the BDDKit library

s2-po-self-healing.description: Creates and updates page objects from HTML source files in resources/base_html/
